positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric hummingbird hovering mid-air against a gradient background of deep teal and emerald green. The hummingbird should have clean, sharp, graphic lines and iridescent jewel-toned feathers (sapphire blue, emerald, amethyst). Include symmetrical floral mandalas and interconnected stylized leaf veins emanating from the central subject. The style must be minimalist tattoo art meets Art Deco poster design, with thick, crisp linework, negative space emphasis, and high-contrast solid color blocking. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly repeatable, designed for high-quality screen printing on textiles. Lighting is flat and crisp, emphasizing the silhouette and pattern details. Aspect ratio square, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, noise, artifact, text, low quality, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, messy, grainy, photo, hyperdetailed, realistic, jpeg artifacts, gradients (unless background), logos, trademarks
